Configuration Reference

Widget reads its configuration from environment variables. A present but unparseable value is a startup error, never a silent fallback to the default.

WIDGET_TIMEOUT_MS

The per-request timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 30000. Requests that exceed this budget are terminated and reported as timeouts, not retried.

WIDGET_MAX_RETRIES

Maximum retry attempts for retryable failures such as HTTP 429 and 5xx responses. Defaults to 3. Transport errors count as retryable.
